calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Elvia Pineda, who was not present at today's hearing.
Fredy Pineda, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Frank Villegas was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Nina Kay Gelfant was placed under oath and served as American Sign Language interpreter for defendant.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 28, 2008.

Parties reached a settlement which was read into the record by Ms. Cruz Keith. In accordance with the terms of the agreement plaintiff Elvia Pineda is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 2689 Bryant Street, Room #5, San Francisco, CA. Defendant Frank Villegas shall vacate the subject premises no later than 5:00 p.m. on September 20, 2008. Said premises shall be left broom clean by defendant. If defendant Frank Villegas complies with the terms of the agreement, plaintiff Elvia Pineda shall dismiss this action and waive all damages, fees and costs. If defendant Frank Villegas fails to comply with the terms set forth above, plaintiff Elvia Pineda may obtain judgment for possession and back rent in the amount of $675.00 against defendant Frank Villegas through ex parte application on twenty-fours notice.

The lease is forfeited. Each party agrees to a mutual release of all claims.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed stipulation for entry of judgment to the Court no later than September 18, 2008.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-SEP-10-2008: Brenda Cruz Keith, counsel for plaintiff Elvia Pineda, who is also present

Settlement Conference off calendar. No appearance by defendant Frank Villegas. The SEP-15-2008 trial date remains.

Commissioner Frank Drago; Clerk L. Fong; not reported (218)
